'''nomachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ohmic|ohmic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ohmic|ohmic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nomachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nomachithi|nomachithi]] || [[word:nomachiji|nomachiji]] || [[word:nomachishi|nomachishi]] || [[word:nomachiki|nomachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nomachuthuthu|nomachuthuthu]] || [[word:nomachujuju|nomachujuju]] || [[word:nomachushushu|nomachushushu]] || [[word:nomachukuku|nomachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nomachuthu|nomachuthu]] || [[word:nomachuju|nomachuju]] || [[word:nomachushu|nomachushu]] || [[word:nomachuku|nomachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nomachufthuf|nomachufthuf]] || [[word:nomachufjuf|nomachufjuf]] || [[word:nomachufshuf|nomachufshuf]] || [[word:nomachufkuf|nomachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nomachethe|nomachethe]] || [[word:nomacheje|nomacheje]] || [[word:nomacheshe|nomacheshe]] || [[word:nomacheke|nomacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nomachothotho|nomachothotho]] || [[word:nomachojojo|nomachojojo]] || [[word:nomachoshosho|nomachoshosho]] || [[word:nomachokoko|nomachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nomachotho|nomachotho]] || [[word:nomachojo|nomachojo]] || [[word:nomachosho|nomachosho]] || [[word:nomachoko|nomachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nomachofthof|nomachofthof]] || [[word:nomachofjof|nomachofjof]] || [[word:nomachofshof|nomachofshof]] || [[word:nomachofkof|nomachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfthĂŻf|nomachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfjĂŻf|nomachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfshĂŻf|nomachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfkĂŻf|nomachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|nomachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|nomachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|nomachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|nomachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfthĂŻf|nomachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfjĂŻf|nomachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfshĂŻf|nomachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfkĂŻf|nomachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfthĂŻf|nomachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfjĂŻf|nomachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfshĂŻf|nomachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nomachĂŻfkĂŻf|nomachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nomachĂŠthĂŠ|nomachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nomachĂŠjĂŠ|nomachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nomachĂŠshĂŠ|nomachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nomachĂŠkĂŠ|nomachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nomachathatha|nomachathatha]] || [[word:nomachajaja|nomachajaja]] || [[word:nomachashasha|nomachashasha]] || [[word:nomachakaka|nomachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nomachatha|nomachatha]] || [[word:nomachaja|nomachaja]] || [[word:nomachasha|nomachasha]] || [[word:nomachaka|nomachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nomachafthaf|nomachafthaf]] || [[word:nomachafjaf|nomachafjaf]] || [[word:nomachafshaf|nomachafshaf]] || [[word:nomachafkaf|nomachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nomachasha|nomachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nomachshĂ«asha|nomachshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nomachroasha|nomachroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nomachmuasha|nomachmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nomachyaasha|nomachyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonomachnkshĂ«asha|gonomachnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonomachnkroasha|gonomachnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonomachnkmuasha|gonomachnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonomachnkyaasha|gonomachnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nomamachasha|nomamachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nomamachshĂ«asha|nomamachshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nomamachroasha|nomamachroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nomamachmuasha|nomamachmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nomamachyaasha|nomamachyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonomamachnkshĂ«asha|gonomamachnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonomamachnkroasha|gonomamachnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonomamachnkmuasha|gonomamachnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonomamachnkyaasha|gonomamachnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nemĂŠchasha|nemĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nemĂŠchshĂ«asha|nemĂŠchshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nemĂŠchroasha|nemĂŠchroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nemĂŠchmuasha|nemĂŠchmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nemĂŠchyaasha|nemĂŠchyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonemĂŠchnkshĂ«asha|gonemĂŠchnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonemĂŠchnkroasha|gonemĂŠchnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonemĂŠchnkmuasha|gonemĂŠchnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonemĂŠchnkyaasha|gonemĂŠchnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nomfachasha|nomfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nomfachshĂ«asha|nomfachshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nomfachroasha|nomfachroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nomfachmuasha|nomfachmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nomfachyaasha|nomfachyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonomfachnkshĂ«asha|gonomfachnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonomfachnkroasha|gonomfachnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonomfachnkmuasha|gonomfachnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonomfachnkyaasha|gonomfachnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
